title: Excalibur | Bosses'Rise Support
description: Revamped abominations rising from ice, fire, shadow and the restless sands
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/362d454c4d5f6f3e9251043836ad335a00eab139.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Bosses'Rise](https://modrinth.com/mod/bossesrise) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all items, blocks and most entities

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- blockfactorystudio – Creators of _Bosses'Rise_
- LowPassFilter - Dragon bones texture
- TC - Sword textures

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-bossesrise)
